task: Browse Marriott Bonvoy credit cards on Marriott.

The task of browsing Marriott Bonvoy credit cards on Marriott.com has been completed successfully.

judge.reasoning:
**Task Understanding:** The user asked the agent to browse Marriott Bonvoy credit cards on Marriott.com. Successful completion means navigating to the relevant credit cards section on Marriott.com and viewing/reporting the content found there.

**Output Assessment:** The agent navigated to marriott.com, found and clicked the "Credit Cards" link in the navigation menu, switched to the new tab that opened, and analyzed the credit cards page. The final response includes specific details extracted from the page: the featured Marriott Bonvoy Boundless® Visa® Signature Card with 4 Free Nights (up to 200,000 points), $100 in airline credits, and mentions of an "Our Credit Cards" link for the full lineup.

**Evidence:** The execution trace is healthy with 6 steps and no errors. Step 2 shows clicking the "Credit Cards" link (element 157), Step 3 shows switching to the new tab (C304), and Step 4 shows a browser_analyze_state that captured the promotional content on the credit cards page. The agent successfully reached https://www.marriott.com/credit-cards.mi and extracted specific details (card name, offer values, amenities) that indicate real page content was read. The integrity status is "healthy" with meaningful browser interaction confirmed.

**Summary:** The agent successfully completed the browsing task by navigating to Marriott.com, clicking through to the Credit Cards section, and reporting specific details about the featured Marriott Bonvoy credit card offerings. The trace shows clear evidence of navigation and content extraction with no errors.
